overall.description: Third-person gameplay from Horizon Zero Dawn showing the protagonist Aloy exploring a wintry mountainous landscape at dusk. She traverses a steaming geothermal pool, rocky terrain, and a misty lakeside while distant mechanical Tallnecks roam the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: geothermal hot spring pool with steam

events.description: character turns around while walking through the pool to face the camera direction
steam density increases as character moves deeper into the pool area

agents.ego_description: walking through the shallow turquoise water of the geothermal pool, surveying the surroundings

entered.detail: shallow hot spring with vibrant turquoise water and steam rising from the surface
steep rocky walls surrounding the pool area
mist rising from the warm water creating atmospheric haze
snow-capped mountains visible through the steam in the background

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a steaming geothermal pool with turquoise water surrounded by rocky cliffs. Steam rises from the warm water creating a misty atmosphere as the character explores the area and turns to survey the surroundings.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain path with snow patches

events.description: character exits the geothermal pool onto the rocky shore
character climbs up rocky terrain and turns left along the path

agents.ego_description: climbing out of the water and ascending the rocky slope through snow-dusted terrain

entered.detail: large boulders and rocks dusted with snow lining the path
snow-covered pine trees on the hillside
narrow path winding through the rocky terrain

segments.scene_description: The character exits the geothermal pool and climbs onto a rocky trail surrounded by snow-covered boulders and evergreen trees. The steam from the pool fades behind as the character ascends the mountain path.

scene_state.functional_zone: dead forest trail overlooking misty valley

events.description: mist becomes more prominent in the valley ahead as the character approaches
sunset colors become more visible in the sky as the character moves into the open

agents.ego_description: traversing the rocky path through the dead forest towards the misty valley with distant mechanical structures visible

notable_agents.action: distant mechanical Tallneck walking through the mist in the valley

entered.detail: leafless bare trees and some evergreen pines lining the trail
fog-filled valley with low visibility containing distant mechanical structures

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dead forest with bare trees lining the rocky path. Mist fills the valley ahead where a massive mechanical Tallneck moves in the distance, and the sky shows vibrant sunset colors.

scene_state.functional_zone: frozen lakeshore at dusk with mountain backdrop

events.description: character reaches the shore of the frozen lake with turquoise ice patches
sunset colors reflect off the water surface creating orange and pink hues

agents.ego_description: walking along the shoreline of the misty lake with distant mountains and mechanical structures ahead

notable_agents.action: mechanical Tallneck moving slowly through the mist near the far shore

entered.detail: partially frozen lake with turquoise water patches and ice along the shore
low fog hovering over the lake surface creating ethereal atmosphere
vibrant sunset sky with pink, orange, and purple clouds

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the shore of a frozen lake at dusk, with mist hovering over the turquoise water. The sunset paints the sky in vibrant colors while a mechanical Tallneck moves through the mist in the distance, and snow-capped mountains rise in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a steaming geothermal basin up through a wintry mountain pass and toward a frozen lakeside at dusk. It begins with the character wading through turquoise geothermal waters surrounded by rocky cliffs, where thick steam creates a heavy, misty atmosphere. As the character exits the pool, the steam fades and the terrain shifts into a rocky ascent marked by snow-covered boulders and evergreen trees. The scene then opens into a dead forest of bare trees, where the mist settles into a valley revealing a massive mechanical Tallneck moving beneath a vibrant sunset sky. Finally, the path leads along the shore of a frozen turquoise lake, with the distant machine still visible through the hovering mist against a backdrop of towering snow-capped mountains.
